Name: Balchem Corporation
Description: Balchem Corporation develops, manufactures, and markets specialty ingredients and performance products for the nutritional, food, pharmaceutical, animal health, medical device sterilization, plant nutrition, and industrial markets in the United States and internationally. The company is headquartered in New Hampton, New York.
